title: Chinese Village
description: A datapack that adds a Chinese style village
body:
The Chinese Village data pack introduces a unique and immersive experience into your Minecraft world, bringing a traditional Chinese village to you. With this pack, players can explore new structures inspired by Chinese architecture of Ming and Qing Dynasties.

# Features:
Chinese-themed structures: Adds custom-built Chinese-style villages that can generate naturally in your Minecraft world. These villages include traditional structures like pagodas, temples, and other architectural wonders, bringing a fresh aesthetic to the game.

Cultural Items and Decor: A variety of Chinese-themed decorations such as lanterns, Paifangs, bonsai trees, and more.

# Compatibility:
Currently, it's compatible with waystone mod and villager guard mod.
